incomingTransition.notes: Begin in complete stillness; establish the office, seating positions, and emotional distance before dialogue starts.
Carry forward the same office layout, eyeline, and seated posture from the establish, cutting closer onto the panda as she begins speaking.
Preserve conversational rhythm and room continuity while reversing to the psychologist after the panda's confession.
Cut back to the panda with the same seated setup and eyeline, but tighter framing to mark the internal shift after the question.
Carry forward the emotional state from the panda's admission, then widen into a shared frame that reunites both characters in calm mutual presence.
